data.body: Inventory turned into child tasks (AC#1): T1=story fe3e-346e-e5eb-42db (schemas+typed MCP+2 bugfixes); T2=43b1-ff14-76ca-4c2f (flag standardize+centralize); T3=faa8-1361-0718-47a7 (--output on lifecycle cmds); T4=42a0-25c8-7d97-4764 (--output on report cmds); T5=a566-4a60-bad1-42d1 (coverage guard+docs). Execution order: T2 (foundational, centralized) -> T1/T4 (shapes+schemas) -> T3 -> T5.
